comments: Archive session by Tangerine Dream only - as requested by Steve Dinsdale
Next weeks show will be the 3rd Birthday program.

sessions.details: only live concert from Tangerine Dream

track_listing.track: 'I'll Rip Your Spine Out' (LP - Double Trouble) Virgin
'Attack Of The Mad Axeman' (LP - MSG) Chrysalis
'Sausolito Summernight' (LP - Watts In A Tank) Mercury
Recorded at the Royal Albert Hall on 1975-04-02
'Take No Prisoners' (single - Take No Prisoners) Park Records
'Wrong Side of the Law' (LP - RX5) Avatar
'Life's Been Good' (LP - But Seriously, Folks...) Asylum
Recorded at the Royal Albert Hall on 1975-04-02

Hello there, this is TV on the Radio here, Thomas the Vance, and welcome once again to The Friday Rock Show.
Right, this evening we have only one band on tape. We have two excerpts from a concert that took place in 1975, actually on the 2nd of April in that year.
It was a recording that captured the electronic atmospheres created by Tangerine Dream.
Also, I've got some new releases from Diesel, Saracen, Herman Ravel, Alvin Lee, and the Atlanta Rhythm Section.
